---
title: "Survey status"
format: html
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dashboardr::.page_config(accessibility = TRUE, crosstab_prefix = "survey_status")
```

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Load dashboardr (includes dplyr, highcharter as dependencies)
library(dashboardr)

# Global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Load multiple datasets

# Load data_1
data_1 <- readRDS('data_1_4obs.rds')
cat('data_1 loaded:', nrow(data_1), 'rows,', ncol(data_1), 'columns\n')

# Load data_2
data_2 <- readRDS('dataset_large_12141obs.rds')
cat('data_2 loaded:', nrow(data_2), 'rows,', ncol(data_2), 'columns\n')

```




## Total breakdown by survey status

```{r total-breakdown-by-survey-status}
# Total breakdown by survey status
result <- viz_treemap(
  data = data_1,
  title = "Total breakdown by survey status",
  value_var = "n",
  group_var = "Survey.status"
)

result
```

## Survey status


::: {.panel-tabset}

### Survey status by observer

```{r survey-status}
# Survey status by observer
result <- viz_stackedbar(
  data = data_2,
  title = "Survey status by observer",
  x_var = "Observer",
  stack_var = "Survey.status",
  stack_label = "Survey status"
)

result
```


### Survey status by farm

```{r survey-status-2}
# Survey status by farm
result <- viz_stackedbar(
  data = data_2,
  title = "Survey status by farm",
  x_var = "Farm.name",
  stack_var = "Survey.status",
  stack_label = "Survey status"
)

result
```


:::
